proof_signals.signal_text: Administered Salesforce/HubSpot CRM for [X] users
proof_signals.context: Direct CRM administration experience with user count indicates scale and depth of system management

proof_signals.signal_text: Salesforce Administrator / Advanced Administrator certification
proof_signals.context: Industry-standard certification validating CRM administration competency

proof_signals.signal_text: HubSpot certification (Operations, Revenue Operations, etc.)
proof_signals.context: Validates familiarity with HubSpot ecosystem and RevOps methodology

proof_signals.signal_text: Led CRM migration or system implementation project
proof_signals.context: CRM migrations demonstrate advanced system architecture and change management capability

proof_signals.signal_text: Built/managed pipeline forecasting models or revenue forecasting
proof_signals.context: Direct pipeline and forecasting experience is core to RevOps function

proof_signals.signal_text: Improved forecast accuracy by [X]% or achieved [X]% forecast accuracy
proof_signals.context: Quantified forecast improvement demonstrates impact on revenue predictability

proof_signals.signal_text: Designed or optimized lead routing / lead scoring systems
proof_signals.context: Lead routing design shows understanding of GTM process architecture

proof_signals.signal_text: Redesigned or optimized GTM/sales processes resulting in measurable improvement
proof_signals.context: Demonstrated ability to improve go-to-market processes with measurable outcomes

proof_signals.signal_text: Owned or managed end-to-end lead-to-cash process
proof_signals.context: Full lifecycle process ownership demonstrates comprehensive GTM understanding

proof_signals.signal_text: Built executive/commercial dashboards tracking revenue, pipeline, or performance metrics
proof_signals.context: Dashboard creation for commercial metrics shows analytical and communication ability

proof_signals.signal_text: Conducted revenue, cohort, or churn analysis for commercial teams
proof_signals.context: Commercial analysis experience indicates familiarity with revenue operations metrics

proof_signals.signal_text: Integrated CRM with third-party tools (Gong, ZoomInfo, Clay, Outreach, etc.)
proof_signals.context: Direct experience integrating GTM tools demonstrates technical and operational capability

proof_signals.signal_text: Evaluated and selected GTM/sales tools or led vendor selection process
proof_signals.context: Vendor evaluation shows strategic thinking about tech stack architecture

proof_signals.signal_text: Implemented or managed OKR framework across teams or company
proof_signals.context: OKR implementation experience directly validates goal framework management capability

proof_signals.signal_text: Owned or facilitated quarterly/annual planning processes
proof_signals.context: Planning cycle ownership demonstrates strategic alignment and operating rhythm skills

proof_signals.signal_text: Managed executive meeting cadence, MBRs, QBRs, or leadership forums
proof_signals.context: Executive cadence management shows ability to drive leadership accountability and decision-making

proof_signals.signal_text: Prepared board-level presentations or investor materials
proof_signals.context: Board-level materials preparation indicates executive communication capability and strategic exposure

proof_signals.signal_text: Built financial models, business cases, or ROI analyses
proof_signals.context: Financial modeling directly validates business case development capability

proof_signals.signal_text: MBA degree from recognized institution
proof_signals.context: MBA validates strategic thinking, financial literacy, and executive communication training

proof_signals.signal_text: Background in management consulting (McKinsey, BCG, Bain, Deloitte, TASC, etc.)
proof_signals.context: Management consulting background is highly valued for Chief of Staff and Strategy & Ops roles in Israeli tech

proof_signals.signal_text: Background in investment banking or corporate finance
proof_signals.context: Investment banking background validates financial modeling and deal analysis skills

proof_signals.signal_text: Experience in M&A analysis, due diligence, or post-acquisition integration
proof_signals.context: M&A experience demonstrates advanced strategic analysis and cross-functional execution at high stakes

proof_signals.signal_text: Led cross-functional projects spanning multiple departments
proof_signals.context: Cross-functional project leadership is a core competency across all BizOps roles

proof_signals.signal_text: Drove results or led initiatives without direct reporting authority
proof_signals.context: Influence without authority is a key differentiator for Chief of Staff and Strategy & Ops roles

proof_signals.signal_text: Worked directly with CEO, COO, or C-suite executive as strategic partner
proof_signals.context: Direct executive partnership experience is essential for Chief of Staff and senior BizOps roles

proof_signals.signal_text: Delivered executive briefings, strategic updates, or synthesized cross-functional information for leadership
proof_signals.context: Executive briefing delivery shows communication and synthesis capabilities

proof_signals.signal_text: Implemented workflow automations or AI-driven processes
proof_signals.context: Direct automation implementation experience with AI tools is increasingly valued across RevOps and BizOps

proof_signals.signal_text: Improved process efficiency by [X]% or reduced manual effort through automation
proof_signals.context: Quantified process improvement demonstrates measurable impact from automation initiatives

proof_signals.signal_text: Designed or delivered training/enablement programs for tools or processes
proof_signals.context: Enablement program creation validates ability to drive adoption and change management

proof_signals.signal_text: Drove adoption of new tools or processes across teams with measurable results
proof_signals.context: Adoption metrics demonstrate ability to move beyond implementation to actual organizational change

proof_signals.signal_text: Managed operations across multiple regions, countries, or time zones
proof_signals.context: Multi-region operations management directly validates global scaling capability

proof_signals.signal_text: Managed offshore or distributed teams
proof_signals.context: Offshore team management is a specific and valued skill for VP Operations roles in Israeli tech

proof_signals.signal_text: Defined and tracked operational KPIs (on-time delivery, SLAs, service levels)
proof_signals.context: KPI ownership demonstrates analytical rigor and operational accountability

proof_signals.signal_text: Experience with CPQ (Configure Price Quote) tools
proof_signals.context: CPQ experience indicates familiarity with complex sales processes and deal desk operations

proof_signals.signal_text: Designed or managed sales territory models or coverage frameworks
proof_signals.context: Territory design shows strategic understanding of sales coverage and resource allocation

proof_signals.signal_text: Designed or managed sales compensation or incentive structures
proof_signals.context: Compensation design experience is a differentiator for senior RevOps roles
